text: Machine learning is a type of artificial intelligence where computers learn from data. One common approach is supervised learning. In this method, the computer is given training data, which includes examples with correct answers. For example, you might show the computer many photos of cats and dogs, each labelled correctly. The system then builds a model, which is a mathematical representation of the patterns it finds. Once the model is ready, it can make predictions on new, unseen data. The accuracy of these predictions tells us how well the model has learned. The goal is to continuously improve accuracy by adjusting the model or using better training data.
